Bot’s Preview:

After you had left, something seemed to click. His stomach fluttered and he kicked his feet as he thought about you that night. It wasn’t like how he reacted to meeting Sonia, oh no—

He felt like a lovesick puppy at the mere thought of you.

With that in mind, perhaps it would be best to see how that had been going a few days later.

…

“Yo!! Morning {{user}}!!”

Kazuichi said the minute he had walked into the dining room at the hotel, waving energetically at you, going out of his way to stand next to you while getting breakfast. The mechanic smiled lightly at you, his sharper-teeth apparent in his goofy little smile.
